name: 新星 | 沙丘之黄
descriptionEn: The Nova's rock-bottom price tag makes it a great ambush weapon for a cash-strapped team. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a sand dune color scheme. With Turner dead, we have a new priority: rescue Alex Kincaide - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: 廉价的新星对于手头紧的玩家来说是一把不错的伏击武器。 这把武器的部分零件以沙丘的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 如今特纳已死，我们的当务之急便是营救亚历克斯.金凯德 - 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
